commit.message:
Fix SQL import parser for real MariaDB dumps

- Replace lazy regex table extraction with depth-counting parser so
  types like int(11) and varchar(100) no longer truncate the body
- mapImportedType now handles display-width types (int(11) -> INT,
  int(10) unsigned -> UNSIGNED INT, tinyint -> INT, etc.)
- Column name regex now supports backtick-quoted names with special
  characters (e.g. `erstellt?am`)
- Add Load .sql file button to import modal as paste workaround for
  VS Code webview clipboard restrictions

commit.message:
Phase 2 v2: Three-Stage Activation Engine

- Schema migration: PoolMember stage tracking, PoolPair selection/feedback/cross-match fields, PersonalizationLine + NewJoinerMatch models
- Test mode: EMAIL_TEST_MODE redirects all emails to aziz@syrena.co.uk
- Flexible pool generation: soft targets (3 investors, 4 founders), tiered fallback (HOT → WARM → GAP_FILL), min 2 per side
- Top-N match presentation: investors see ≤4 founders, founders see ≤3 investors
- New Joiners system: separate flow for users < 7 days old, 2-3 curated matches each
- AI personalization: LLM-generated "why relevant" lines per pair via OpenAI
- Email templates: personalization in A1/B1, feedback delivery, new joiner welcome
- Three-stage APIs: selection recording, cross-match detection, feedback delivery, CSV export
- Control Tower UI: stage progress tracker, cross-match matrix, personalization review, selection modal, feedback form, new joiners page, test mode banner

test: mutation tests for add/remove field operations (#69329)

* [Mutation Testing] Add tests for metabase.lib.field/fieldable-columns

* test: mutation tests for add-field, add-field-to-join, remove-field, remove-field-from-join

Adds tests that kill surviving mutations:
- add-field: expression column with explicit :fields (kills :source/expressions mutation)
- add-field-to-join: join with :none fields (kills 5 mutations)
- remove-field: expression column removal (kills :source/expressions mutation)
- remove-field-from-join: join with :none fields (kills 4 mutations)

feat: proactive engagement — multi-platform replies, rate limiting, outcome tracking

Phase 2 of the social listening & proactive engagement system:

- Migration 043: engagement_type/conversation_id/reasoning columns on engagement_replies,
  engagement_outcomes table for reply effectiveness, engagement_rate_limits table
- EngagementAgent refactored into reactive (existing) + proactive (new) phases
- Proactive: fetches queued conversations from Listener, drafts replies via LLM,
  posts via correct platform (Bluesky/Twitter/Reddit/LinkedIn)
- Rate limiting: per-client per-platform hourly (3) and daily (10) caps
- Anti-spam: no duplicate replies to same author within 24h
- EngagementOutcomeTracker: checks reply metrics, scores effectiveness,
  generates aggregate reports
- Orchestrator: wires outcome tracker after engagement, updates all platform clients
- Tests: 15 tests covering proactive flow, rate limits, multi-platform dispatch,
  outcome tracking, effectiveness reports

All features gated behind proactive_engagement_enabled flag (default: false).

commit.message:
fix(checkin): usar session do AppContext em vez de refreshSession()

refreshSession() disparava onAuthStateChange → loadAllData() → setLoading(true)
→ ProtectedRoute desmontava o Layout → CheckIn perdia todo estado local
(o "blink" que fazia a tela piscar e sumir o resultado).

Agora lê session diretamente do useApp(), que já é mantida atualizada
pelo AppContext sem efeitos colaterais.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: restore blocking --More-- at stair transitions

The commit caa42309 incorrectly made stair transition --More-- prompts
non-blocking. C's goto_level() calls docrt() which triggers
display_nhwindow(WIN_MESSAGE, TRUE) in the tty port, showing --More--
and blocking until the player presses a key. The Space that dismisses
the prompt is consumed by the more handler, not the command parser.

Restores waitForStairMessageAck() with blocking morePrompt(), fixing
4 selfplay session regressions (seed301, seed305, seed309, seed313).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Track skill invocations in DB and show usage on admin Skills page

Add skill_invocations table (user_id, session_id, skill_name, args,
timestamp). Log every skill invoke in session-stream.ts. New admin
endpoint GET /admin/skills/usage returns aggregate stats (count, unique
users, last used) and daily timeseries. Skills page shows horizontal
bar chart of invocation counts per skill.

MCP tool calls were already tracked via the tool_calls column on
messages and visible on the admin Tools page.

commit.message:
Add migration 014 to fix SO-260217-001 Flake over-shipment (300→200 lb)

System recorded 300 lb shipped but only 200 lb physically left.
Migration zeroes out the extra 100 lb deduction on lot "FEB 24 2026",
corrects shipment_lines/sales_order_shipments/sales_order_lines, and
updates order status to partial_ship. Also adds a zero-quantity filter
to the packing slip query so corrected rows don't appear.

commit.message:
Improve VaR diagnostic logging for hedged portfolios (#1187)

* Fix 5 production bugs: VaR multiplier, stale prices, fill tasks, PRG guards

- Fix VaR dollar multiplier: use commodity profile lookup instead of raw
  IB c.multiplier (37500 → 375 for cents-quoted KC) in both FUT and FOP
  blocks
- Fix VaR stale prices: always compute B-S model price and cross-validate
  against IB market price; substitute when deviation >80% (catches
  FORCE_DELAYED_DATA returning averageCost)
- Fix fill task lifecycle: collect fill handler tasks and await them with
  15s timeout before releasing IB connection, preventing partial spread
  closes from orphaned CONTRADICT auto-close tasks
- Fix emergency cycle PRG guard: add PortfolioRiskGuard check after
  DrawdownGuard so emergency cycles respect account-wide HALT status
- Fix scheduled path position sync: call update_positions() from
  guarded_generate_orders using live TMS count, not just emergency path

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Improve VaR $0 diagnostic: distinguish hedged portfolio from data issues

When VaR returns $0 with open positions, log scenario distribution
to distinguish genuinely hedged portfolios (all scenarios profitable)
from stale data issues. Reduces false alarm noise in logs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
fix: lint gate resilience — fmt fallback + split clippy for test code

- L0 fmt: fall back from --all to workspace-only when path deps fail
- L1 clippy: split into lib (strict -D warnings) and test/bench
  (allows unwrap, disallowed_methods, expect_used, panic in tests)

Fixes fmt failures on repos with cross-repo path deps (batuta, realizar,
rmedia, wos) and clippy failures on repos with strict .clippy.toml
configs that ban unwrap() in test code.

fix: logModeration NOT NULL constraint on post_id

moderation runs before a post is saved to DB (no post_id yet), causing
every initial SMS caption check to throw a FK constraint error.

- Skip logModeration entirely when post_id is absent (no point logging
  a moderation record with no post to associate it with)
- schema.sql: make moderation_flags.post_id nullable for fresh installs

feat: add Risk Management section, populate remaining control requirements/evidence/artifacts

Part A — Content gap fix:
- Add requirements for 12 missing controls (now 22/22 covered)
- Add evidence items for 12 missing controls (76 total evidence items)
- Add 13 new artifacts across 2 new categories (28 total, 8 categories)

Part B — Risk Management section (risk-management/):
- methodology.json: 6-phase assessment methodology with AI-specific risk factors,
  5-point likelihood/impact scales covering human rights, bias, safety, transparency,
  accountability, and regulatory penalties (EU AI Act fines up to 7% turnover)
- risk-matrix.json: Standard 5x5 matrix with 5 risk levels
- risk-register.json: 20 AI governance risks across 7 categories with inherent
  and residual risk scores, treatment plans, and framework references
- checklist.json: 18-item risk assessment checklist across 4 lifecycle phases
- treatment-options.json: 4 strategies (avoid/mitigate/transfer/accept) with
  AI-specific examples and EU AI Act prohibited practices

Part C — App updates:
- New risk-management route and renderRiskManagement function with 4 tabs
  (Methodology, Risk Register, Checklist, Treatment Options)
- Nav link added to index.html
- State object extended with riskManagement property

Part D — README updated with risk-management/ in structure tree, updated
  layer count (7 -> 8), updated statistics

commit.message:
feat(mcp): implement tools and resources (fotos-0j0, fotos-rsw)

Implement all 6 MCP tools (take_screenshot, ocr_screenshot,
annotate_screenshot, analyze_screenshot, auto_redact_pii,
list_screenshots) and 4 resources (screenshots://recent,
screenshots://{id}, screenshots://{id}/ocr, settings://current).

All calls delegate to the main Tauri app via the IPC bridge. The
bridge is connected lazily on first use and retried after failures,
so the MCP server degrades gracefully when the app is not running.

commit.message:
feat(voice): add WebRTC transport support to FastRTC backend

FastRTC backend now supports all three transport modes:
- WebRTC: audio via RTP tracks through emit queue
- WebSocket: mu-law encoded audio in JSON (existing path)
- Telephone: Twilio-style telephony WebSocket (existing path)

Key changes:
- Detect transport type (webrtc vs websocket) at connection time
- Per-connection emit queues for WebRTC sessions
- send_audio/send_audio_sync route to correct transport path
- Handler emit() returns frames from queue for WebRTC connections

  in now correctly redirects instead of showing the login form

Active time system:
- Update user.lastSeenAt in MongoDB on every socket connect and
  disconnect so timestamps accurately reflect real usage

- Add formatLastSeen() util: returns { label, isActive } where
  isActive is true only if last seen < 5 min ago
